## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines (ruff)
- [ ] Type hints are added/updated (ty)
- [ ] No new warnings or errors
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing

### Agent Changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Agent YAML syntax is valid
- [ ] Agent personality is preserved
- [ ] System prompt is clear and consistent

### Documentation
- [ ] README.md updated if needed
- [ ] Relevant docs/ files updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated

### Testing
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make type-check` passes (or errors are acceptable)
- [ ] `make test` passes
